attributes.action: Make Epilepsy Awareness & First Aid Training Mandatory in Schools and Workplaces
attributes.additional_details: Epilepsy affects 1 in 100 people in the UK, yet many don’t know how to respond to a seizure, risking avoidable harm. This is personal to me—my 10-year-old son, Jayden, has epilepsy and relies on others to keep him safe at school and in public. No parent should fear this. Mandatory training in schools and workplaces would improve safety, reduce stigma, and help protect people like Jayden.
attributes.background: Require all UK schools and workplaces to provide mandatory epilepsy awareness and seizure first aid training as part of health and safety and safeguarding requirements.

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open on this subject and therefore can't open another one like it  The open petition will get more support if other people like you and those who might have supported your petition sign it:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767644
